reviews.comment:
Excelente servicio . Ambiente agradable y podes tomar un rico café con algo dulce mientras si necesitas esperar o simplemente desayunar como hice yo antes de renovar mi licencia .
A dos cuadras de mi casa , mejor imposible , recomiendo ❤️

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. Pleasant atmosphere, and you can enjoy a delicious coffee and something sweet while you wait, or simply have breakfast, as I did before renewing my license. Just two blocks from my house—it couldn't be better! Highly recommend it ❤️

reviewReply.comment: Gracias muy amable saludos

reviews.comment:
Vine a tomar el café ☕️  que me obsequiaron por cargar en YPF ACA central. A las 19hs hay un ambiente de biblioteca en el Full... muy relajado, limpisimo, excelente la atención del chico que me atendió.  Muy bueno que un mail te recuerde la invitacion y que podes acercarte a disfrutar . Saludos

(Translated by Google)
I came to have the free coffee ☕️ I received for filling up at the YPF ACA station. At 7 pm, the Full service station has a library-like atmosphere... very relaxed, spotless, and the service from the young man who helped me was excellent. It's great that an email reminds you of the invitation and that you can come and enjoy it. Cheers!

reviewReply.comment: Gracias jorge un placer atenderte saludos

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURxaHFlUVlBEAE

reviews.comment:
Soy socio hace mas de 30 años!!, esta todo dicho!!, en cuanto a atencion servicio en AMBA y En Ruta buenisimo!!, estaciones de servicios impecables y empleados con muy buena atencion!!!, sentis que perteneces a una institucion seria y responsable, lo digo por experiencias propias tanto en bs as como en el interior!!

(Translated by Google)
I've been a member for over 30 years!! That says it all!! As for customer service in the Buenos Aires Metropolitan Area (AMBA) and on the road, it's excellent!! The service stations are spotless and the employees are very attentive!!! You feel like you belong to a serious and responsible institution. I say this from my own experiences both in Buenos Aires and in the interior of the country!!
